ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., lottery, scratch-off) */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations of the game */,
  "min_player_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age required to play the game */,
  "max_number_of_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed per game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draws" (
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draw */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the draw belongs to */,
  "draw_date" TEXT /* Date of the draw */,
  "draw_number" INTEGER /* Number of the draw */,
  "draw_status" TEXT /* Status of the draw (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draws_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "numbers" (
  "number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the number belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the number belongs to */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number drawn */,
  "ball_set" TEXT /* Ball set used for the draw (e.g., main, bonus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_numbers_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_numbers_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the winner played */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the winner participated in */,
  "numbers_matched" INTEGER /* Number of numbers matched by the winner */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Prize amount won by the winner */,
  "winner_type" TEXT /* Type of winner (e.g., jackpot, non-jackpot) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_funds" (
  "prize_fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize fund */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the prize fund belongs to */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the prize fund belongs to */,
  "prize_fund_amount" TEXT /* Total prize fund amount */,
  "rollover_amount" TEXT /* Rollover amount for the next draw */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_funds_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_funds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_winnings" (
  "player_winnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player winnings */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the winner played */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the winner participated in */,
  "winnings" TEXT /* Total winnings of the player */,
  "tax_deduction" TEXT /* Tax deduction from the winnings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_winnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_winnings_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winners ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_winnings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_winnings_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner making the claim */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the claim belongs to */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the claim belongs to */,
  "claim_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winners ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winner_info" (
  "winner_info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner information */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the winner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the winner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the winner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the winner */,
  "identification_number" TEXT /* Government-issued identification number of the winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winner_info_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES winners ("winner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the result belongs to */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw the result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., winning numbers, prize amounts) */,
  "jackpot_winner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game had a jackpot winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_history" (
  "game_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game history */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the history belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., winning numbers, prize amounts) */,
  "total_prize_fund" TEXT /* Total prize fund for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_history_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the action */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "security_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the action */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_log_id")
)
